channel.title: Enjl's Blenjl
channel.description: Hi, I'm Enjl. Welcome to my website.

item.title: Thoughts on completion
item.description: See that mountain over there? Wouldn't it be much more fun to think about it than to actually climb it?

item.title: How to learn anything
item.description: A choose-your-own-adventure blog about learning and kindness towards yourself and others

item.title: You are what makes your game yours
item.description: Or: UNLEARN THEORY EMBRACE YOUR BRAIN.

item.title: Designing to make players gamify themselves
item.description: A non-visual non-novel-type non-game you can play with your eyes.
